channel.title: Google on My News Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Google on My News Blog

item.title: Google's TurboQuant Slashes AI Memory Usage by 6×
item.description: New compression algorithm delivers massive memory savings with zero accuracy loss.

item.title: Apple Is Using Google's Gemini to Train On-Device AI Models
item.description: The tech giants' partnership deepens as Apple distills Gemini for its devices.
